motd: Welcome to the Anomaly Menu! I hope you have a wonderful time using this amazing mod menu! Go to the discord to report bugs on the menu. (Developers of the Anomaly Menu are not responsible if you get banned.)

modVersionInfo.notLatestMessage: You are not on the latest version of Anomaly Menu.\ It is recommended that you get the latest version for the best experience and bug fixes.
modVersionInfo.outdatedMessage: <color=red>You are not on the latest release of Anomaly Menu!</color>\ A new tab should have open to get the latest version.\ If it did not open please manually download the latest at:\ <size=80%><b>https://discord.gg/87p5tTNsvf<b></size>\
